chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.51 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application --------------------------------------------- 28.01.2026 Mr. Habib-ur-Rehman Khan Safi, advocate for applicant ------------------------------------------------ Learned counsel for applicant/accused does not press the instant criminal bail application, which is accordingly dismissed. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
